verification.subject: Verify your account
verification.title: Verify Your Email
verification.summary: Please confirm your email address to activate your account.
verification.body: Please verify your account by clicking the button below. This confirms your email address and activates your account.
verification.expiry: This link will expire in 15 minutes.
passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.title: Reset Your Password
passwordReset.summary: A password reset was requested for your account. Click below to set a new password.
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new one.
passwordReset.expiry: This link will expire in 30 minutes.
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
welcome.subject: Welcome to {appName}!
welcome.body: Your account has been created successfully. You can now start using the platform.
leadUpdate.subject: Confirm your information update
leadUpdate.title: Confirm Your Update
leadUpdate.summary: A request was made to update your information. Please review the changes and confirm.
leadUpdate.body: A request was made to update your information. Please review the changes below before confirming.
leadUpdate.confirmPrompt: If these changes are correct, click the button below to apply them.
leadUpdate.expiry: This link will expire in 15 minutes.
leadUpdate.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email. No changes will be made to your information.
leadUpdate.field.name: Name
insufficientCredit.preheader: Your credit balance is running low
insufficientCredit.subject: Credits exhausted — {systemName}
insufficientCredit.title: Your Credits Have Run Out
insufficientCredit.greeting: Hi {name}, we wanted to let you know that your available credits have been fully consumed.
insufficientCredit.body: An operation was attempted but could not be completed because there are no remaining credits. To continue using credit-consuming features, please purchase additional credits or wait for your plan to renew.
insufficientCredit.renewalNote: Plan credits will automatically refill when your current billing cycle renews.
paymentSuccess.subject: Payment confirmed — {systemName}
paymentSuccess.title: Payment Confirmed
paymentSuccess.greeting: Hi {name}, your payment has been processed successfully.
paymentSuccess.summaryRecurring: Your plan subscription on {systemName} has been renewed successfully.
paymentSuccess.summaryCredits: Your credit purchase on {systemName} has been completed.
paymentSuccess.summaryAutoRecharge: An automatic credit recharge on {systemName} has been completed.
paymentFailure.subject: Payment failed — {systemName}
paymentFailure.title: Payment Failed
paymentFailure.greeting: Hi {name}, we were unable to process your payment.
paymentFailure.summaryRecurring: The recurring charge for your plan on {systemName} could not be completed.
paymentFailure.summaryCredits: The credit purchase on {systemName} could not be completed.
paymentFailure.summaryAutoRecharge: The automatic credit recharge on {systemName} could not be completed.
paymentFailure.body: Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption. If you believe this is an error, contact our support team.
paymentFailure.urgentNote: Your subscription may be suspended if payment is not resolved.
autoRecharge.subject: Auto-recharge initiated — {systemName}
autoRecharge.title: Auto-Recharge Initiated
autoRecharge.greeting: Hi {name}, an automatic credit recharge is being processed.
autoRecharge.body: Your credits on {systemName} were insufficient for a requested operation, so auto-recharge has been triggered to keep your services running.
autoRecharge.note: You will receive a confirmation email once the charge is processed. If the charge fails, you will be notified with instructions.
autoRecharge.disableHint: You can disable auto-recharge at any time from your billing settings.
tenantInvite.preheader: You've been invited to join a team
tenantInvite.subject: {inviterName} invited you to join {companyName}
tenantInvite.title: You've Been Invited
tenantInvite.greeting: Hi {name}, you have a new invitation!
tenantInvite.body: {inviterName} has added you to {companyName}. You now have access to the system with the roles listed below.
tenantInvite.existingAccountNote: Since you already have an account, simply log in to access your new workspace.
layout.footer: This is a secure, automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.
recoveryVerify.subject: Verify your recovery channel
recoveryVerify.title: Verify Recovery Channel
recoveryVerify.summary: Please confirm this recovery channel to verify you own this email address or phone number.
recoveryVerify.body: Please verify this recovery channel by clicking the button below. This confirms you own this email address or phone number.
recoveryVerify.expiry: This link will expire in 15 minutes.
recoveryChannelReset.preheader: Reset your password via recovery channel
recoveryChannelReset.subject: Reset your password via recovery channel
recoveryChannelReset.title: Password Reset via Recovery Channel
recoveryChannelReset.summary: A password reset was requested through your verified recovery channel. Click below to set a new password.
recoveryChannelReset.body: We received a request to reset your password via your recovery channel. Click the button below to choose a new one.
recoveryChannelReset.expiry: This link will expire in 30 minutes.
recoveryChannelReset.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
